name: Graphite Bio, Inc.
description: Graphite Bio, Inc. is a clinical-stage gene editing company focused on developing therapies for serious and life-threatening diseases. The company utilizes its proprietary targeted gene integration platform, which harnesses the natural cellular process of homology-directed repair (HDR), to precisely repair genetic mutations, replace entire genes, or insert new genes into specific genomic locations. Graphite Bio's lead product candidates are designed to treat sickle cell disease, beta-thalassemia, and other genetic disorders.
